# Calculation service for esdl_type ElectricityNetwork:

Routes datacenter demand to the grid and battery. Central optimization intelligence. Monitors data and creates dispatch plans.

## Calculations

### day_ahead_routing 

Processes DA limits and forecasts, publishes consumption plan.
#### Input parameters
|Name            |esdl_type            |data_type            |unit            |description            |
|----------------|---------------------|---------------------|----------------|-----------------------|
|power_limit_plan_DA|PowerPlant|STRING|JSON|Grid limits|
|mandated_min_power_draw_DA|PowerPlant|STRING|JSON|Grid mandate|
|carbon_intensity_plan_DA|PowerPlant|STRING|JSON|Grid carbon|
|planned_generation_DA|PVInstallation|STRING|JSON|RES forecast|
### network_dispatch 

Splits the required power between the Grid and the BESS.
#### Input parameters
|Name            |esdl_type            |data_type            |unit            |description            |
|----------------|---------------------|---------------------|----------------|-----------------------|
|demand_power_w|ElectricityDemand|DOUBLE|W|Total power requested by the datacenter|
|actual_power_limit_ID|PowerPlant|DOUBLE|W|Grid limit|
|actual_power_w|PowerPlant|DOUBLE|W|Grid The actual power supplied (positive) or absorbed (negative)|
|actual_carbon_intensity_ID|PowerPlant|DOUBLE|gCO2/kWh|Grid carbon|
|bess_power_w|Battery|DOUBLE|W|BESS output|
|state_of_charge|Battery|DOUBLE|pct|BESS SoC|
|max_available_charge|Battery|DOUBLE|W|BESS charge limit|
|max_available_discharge|Battery|DOUBLE|W|BESS discharge limit|
|potential_available_generation_ID|PVInstallation|DOUBLE|W|RES potential|
|supplied_power_ID|PVInstallation|DOUBLE|W|RES actual|
|Backup_supplied_power|GasProducer|DOUBLE|W|Backup actual|
|available_max_power|GasProducer|DOUBLE|W|Backup max|
#### Output values
|Name             |data_type             |unit             |description             |
|-----------------|----------------------|-----------------|------------------------|
|bess_allocation_w|DOUBLE|W|Power requested from the battery|
|grid_allocation_w|DOUBLE|W|Power requested from the grid connection|
|current_max_power_limit|DOUBLE|W|Curtailment command for Renewables|
|Backup_requested_power|DOUBLE|W|Generator dispatch command|
